Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x7000 "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\SWAG.prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $2100 lda #$37 sta $01 jsr $2000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "SWAG.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added a routine at $7000 to display the loading screen (the colour RAM is loaded for this to display correctly) and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game. It then sets the correct VICII settings before starting the game.
